name: Validation green closeout for nine failing checks
purpose: Close the nine validation failures that remained after item 031: six missing legacy scaffold artifacts and three Stage A Sudoku6 G1/L4 diagnostic checks. This item records real regenerated artifacts and measured diagnostic pass data while preserving the distinction between diagnostic checks and the still-unproven full autonomous Stage A grid.

code_added_used.change: Added a repo-local 6x6 banded Sudoku generator with DPLL traces for Stage A G1 diagnostics.
Replaced the fail-closed placeholder with a concrete Sudoku6 diagnostic: exact forced-move bridge baseline, train/eval encoding check, and L4 structural probes.
Updated validation report text so all-green states are described correctly.
Updated ledger narrative and artifact index for item 032 and the diagnostic Stage A status.
Whitelisted regenerated legacy scaffold result JSON artifacts.

commands.command: ~/.local/bin/uv run --python .venv/bin/python python -m experiments.ttt_reversibility && ~/.local/bin/uv run --python .venv/bin/python python -m experiments.two_by_two_falsification && ~/.local/bin/uv run --python .venv/bin/python python -m experiments.d_stage_1_depth1_gate && ~/.local/bin/uv run --python .venv/bin/python python -m experiments.d_stage_2_capacity && ~/.local/bin/uv run --python .venv/bin/python python -m experiments.d_stage_3_vs_cot && ~/.local/bin/uv run --python .venv/bin/python python -m experiments.verifier_verification
commands.purpose: Regenerated the six missing legacy scaffold result artifacts.
Generated Sudoku6 L1-L2 diagnostic data and measured G1/L4 bridge checks.
Confirmed the validation registry is all green after the fixes.

provenance.legacy_mode: regenerated from existing lightweight scaffold entrypoints

honesty.does_not_establish: This item does not establish the full learned recurrent Stage A autonomous grid, does not run G2, and does not turn scaffold legacy artifacts into front-page proof. The Stage A G1/L4 checks are diagnostic and measured, not a complete core-claim proof.
limitations: The Sudoku6 bridge uses an exact symbolic forced-move baseline, not a trained recurrent bridge.
Stage A backtrack report still records no autonomous cells.
Legacy scaffold artifacts are regenerated for validation completeness and historical provenance only.

decision.next_step_routing: Proceed to learned recurrent Stage A bridge/autonomous grid work; validation is green, but the core claim still needs full autonomous Stage A evidence.
